intro: Bermudiana minutiflora, also known as Bermudiana or Bermuda-knotgrass, is a perennial plant species native to the tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The bioactive constituents of Bermudiana minutiflora include flavonoids, glycosides, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
